hooks.command: if jq -re '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '(^|[;&|] *)git commit'; then if ! command -v pre-commit >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"pre-commit is not installed. Install it with: pip install pre-commit"}'; exit 0; fi; pre-commit run --all-files >&2 || { echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"pre-commit checks failed"}'; exit 0; }; fi
